user_task_description: This tracker sheet has risk scores, but urgent items do not stand out visually.
single_step_benchmark_instruction: Visually highlight all rows where the `Risk Score` is greater than or equal to 85.
atomic_scope: Only highlighting/emphasis is explicitly requested in this task.
expected_output_type: A revised .xlsx workbook where high-risk rows are clearly highlighted.

inspired_by.title: Conditional formatting based on a different cell's value

notes.Latent Issues Intentionally Left In The:
- Column widths and layout are rough
- Status logic could be improved
- Dates are not visually prioritized, but that is not the explicit request
